zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard Hudleston於1378年之前出生在英國波藍德米洛姆時，他的父親Sir John Hudleston III57歲，母親Catherine Tempest17歲。他和Margaret Harrington至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。他於1415年登記服兵役。他去世於1435年之後在英國波藍德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Richard Hudleston于1378年之前出生在英国波藍德米洛姆时，他的父亲Sir John Hudleston III57岁，母亲Catherine Tempest17岁。他和Margaret Harrington至少有2个儿子和2个女儿。他于1415年登记服兵役。他去世于1435年之后在英国波藍德。

nameMeanings.name: Hudleston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Huddleston
meanings: English: habitational name from Huddleston (Yorkshire), from an Old English personal name Hūdel (genitive Hūdeles; see Huddle ) + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard Hudleston was born before 1378, in Millom, Cumberland, England, his father, Sir John Hudleston III, was 57 and his mother, Catherine Tempest, was 17. He had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Margaret Harrington. He registered for military service in 1415. He died after 1435, in Cumberland, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard Hudleston est né avant 1378, à Millom, Cumberland, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Hudleston III, avait 57 ans et sa mère, Catherine Tempest, avait 17 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Margaret Harrington. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1415. Il est décédé après 1435, à Cumberland, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Richard Hudleston vor 1378 in Millom, Cumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Hudleston III 57 und seine Mutter Catherine Tempest 17. Er hatte mit Margaret Harrington mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er hat sich 1415 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb nach 1435 in Cumberland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Hudleston è nato il prima del 1378 nel Millom, Cumberland, England, il suo padre, Sir John Hudleston III, aveva 57 anni e il suo madre, Catherine Tempest, aveva 17 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Margaret Harrington. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1415. Morì dopo il 1435, nel Cumberland, England.

ja.Cumberland, England: イギリスクウンバーランド
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Hudlestonが1378年以前にイギリスクウンバーランドミロムで生まれた時，父Sir John Hudleston IIIは57歳，母Catherine Tempestは17歳であった。彼はMargaret Harringtonとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1415年に兵役登録をした。彼は1435年以後にイギリスクウンバーランドで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Hudleston(이)가 1378년 이전 영국 쿠벌랜드 미롬에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Hudleston III(은)는 57세였고, 그의 어머니 Catherine Tempest(은)는 17세였다. 그는 Margaret Harrington(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1415년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1435년 이후 영국 쿠벌랜드에서 사망했다.

mn.Millom Castle, Millom, Cumberland, Engla: Millom, Cumbraland, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Hudleston nasceu antes 1378, em Millom, Cumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Hudleston III, tinha 57 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Tempest, tinha 17 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com Margaret Harrington. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1415. Ele faleceu após 1435, em Cumberland, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard Hudleston родился перед 1378 г. в местности миллом, кумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Hudleston III было 57 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine Tempest, 17. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Margaret Harrington. В 1415 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер после 1435 г. в местности кумбирланд, Англия.

sm.before 1378–after 1435: a'e le'I oo le 1378–ina ua ma'ea le 1435

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Richard Hudleston nació antes de 1378, en Millom, Cumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Hudleston III, tenía 57 años y su mamá, Catherine Tempest, tenía 17 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas con Margaret Harrington. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1415. Murió después de 1435, en Cumberland, Inglaterra.
